3162810.name: DANCING STAR PC
3162810.description:
Dancing Star is an experiential dance game where you can dance along to famous K-POP songs.

Anyone with a webcam can enjoy it.

You can enjoy famous K-POP music and the latest songs.

  • Enjoy popular K-POP music.
  • Dance along with the dancers who are dancing.
  • Earn and record scores through motion recognition.
  • Share gameplay videos to become a star.
3162810.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
